# 3M - Business Website

## About
3M is a business solutions company delivering innovative strategies, project management,
digital transformation, and market analysis services. We help businesses of all sizes
navigate complexity and achieve sustainable growth.

## Pages
- Home (/): Overview of 3M services, hero section, and call to action
- Our Projects (/projects): Portfolio of 6 major projects across logistics, retail, healthcare, government, finance, and manufacturing
- About Us (/about): Company mission, values, statistics, and team information

## Services
- Strategy Consulting: Business vision definition and growth roadmaps
- Project Management: End-to-end project execution with proven methodologies
- Digital Transformation: Modernization with cutting-edge technology solutions
- Market Analysis: Data-driven insights for informed business decisions

## Contact
- Email: info@3m.com
- Phone: +1 (555) 000-0000
